description_long: This is a modern, multi-story house with a flat roof and a geometric, boxy design. The exterior features a combination of white and terracotta-colored walls, with large windows and sliding glass doors that provide ample natural light. The house includes multiple balconies and terraces, some with glass railings, and a spacious ground-level patio area with outdoor seating. There is a driveway and garage space visible, as well as landscaped surroundings with several trees and shrubs. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, flat-roofed multi-story house with large windows, terracotta and white walls, balconies, and landscaped surroundings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the terracotta upper story, flat roof, and a large tree adjacent to the house.
description_view_1: Front angle highlighting the main entry, large patio, glass doors, and a prominent palm tree.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with visible driveway, garage, and a car parked in front, plus more landscaping.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the garage entrance, a balcony with glass railing, and a mix of trees and shrubs.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a large glass door, minimal steps, and a covered patio area with no ornate decorations.
